case_title: ARZADON, JULIEBETH B. VS TEJADA, JOHN C/O BRANDON SYSTEMS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY ARZADON, JULIEBETH B. AS TO DEFENDANT TEJADA, JOHN C/O BRANDON SYSTEMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TEJADA, JOHN C/O BRANDON SYSTEMS HEARING SET FOR JUN-18-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARZADON, JULIEBETH B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEJADA, JOHN C/O BRANDON SYSTEMS $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $18.60 INTEREST, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $788.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO JOHN TEJADA (BRANDON SYSTEMS) RETURNED SIGNED.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TEJADA, JOHN C/O BRANDON SYSTEMS
NOT. OF MOTION TO VACATE TO JULIE ARZADON RETURNED, NOT FORWARDABLE.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-18-1993, DENIED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TEJADA, JOHN C/O BRANDON SYSTEMS
